positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical representation of a celestial forest biome, featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central composition includes large, stylized, glowing mushrooms and intertwining roots forming a natural, symmetrical mandala pattern. The color palette must be deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, electric purples, and accents of luminous gold. The style should be neo-art nouveau stained glass meets cosmic botanical illustration. Focus on clean, graphic silhouettes and strong, high-contrast contrast between the deep background and the glowing foreground elements. Perfect for an apparel print, highly intricate, maximalist design.
negative: blurry, low detail, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, caption, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, bokeh, grayscale
